title: Quotient Ring
statement:
Let $R$ be a commutative ring and let $I \subseteq R$ be an ideal.
The \emph{quotient ring} $R/I$ is the set of cosets
\[
R/I := \{ a + I : a \in R \},
\]
equipped with addition and multiplication defined by
\[
(a + I) + (b + I) := (a + b) + I,
\]
\[
(a + I) \cdot (b + I) := (a \cdot b) + I.
\]
